schematicimporter.list.empty: No schematics found in the schematics folder.
schematicimporter.warn.confirm_required: Run /schem paste again to confirm and replace unknown blocks with air.
schematicimporter.paste.started: Pasting %s blocks asynchronously... Use /schem cancel to stop.
schematicimporter.error.no_schematic_loa: No schematic loaded. Use /schem load <name> first.
schematicimporter.error.player_only: This command can only be run by a player.
schematicimporter.error.no_active_paste: No active paste or preview to cancel.
schematicimporter.error.paste_in_progres: Paste in progress -- use /schem cancel first.
schematicimporter.error.not_previewing: No active preview. Use /schem preview first.
schematicimporter.preview.started: Preview started (%dx%dx%d). Green particles show the bounding box.
schematicimporter.preview.auto: Preview active (%dx%dx%d). Use /schem nudge, /schem rotate, /schem confirm, or /schem paste.
schematicimporter.preview.hint: Use /schem nudge <direction> to adjust, /schem confirm to paste, /schem cancel to stop.
schematicimporter.undo.started: Undoing last paste... Use /schem cancel to stop.
